"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as DialogPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-dialog"
import { X } from "lucide-react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const Dialog = DialogPrimitive.Root

const DialogTrigger = DialogPrimitive.Trigger

const DialogPortal = DialogPrimitive.Portal

const DialogClose = DialogPrimitive.Close

const DialogOverlay = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof DialogPrimitive.Overlay>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof DialogPrimitive.Overlay>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <DialogPrimitive.Overlay
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        position: "fixed",
        inset: "inset-0",
        zIndex: "z-50",
        backgroundColor: "bg-black/80",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
DialogOverlay.displayName = DialogPrimitive.Overlay.displayName

const DialogContent = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof DialogPrimitive.Content>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof DialogPrimitive.Content>
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <DialogPortal>
    <DialogOverlay />
    <DialogPrimitive.Content
      ref={ref}
      className={tw.def([className], {
          position: "fixed",
          left: "left-[50%]",
          top: "top-[50%]",
          zIndex: "z-50",
          display: "grid",
          width: "w-full",
          maxWidth: "max-w-lg",
          translate: ["translate-x-[-50%]", "translate-y-[-50%]"],
          gap: "gap-4",
          borderWidth: "border",
          backgroundColor: "bg-background",
          padding: "p-6",
          boxShadow: "shadow-lg",
          transitionDuration: "duration-200",
          sm: {
              borderRadius: "sm:rounded-lg",
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    >
      {children}
      <DialogPrimitive.Close className={tw.style({
                position: "absolute",
                right: "right-4",
                top: "top-4",
                borderRadius: "rounded-sm",
                opacity: "opacity-70",
                boxShadow: "ring-offset-background",
                transitionProperty: "transition-opacity",
                hover: {
                    opacity: "hover:opacity-100",
                },
                focus: {
                    outlineStyle: "focus:outline-none",
                    boxShadow: ["focus:ring-2", "focus:ring-ring", "focus:ring-offset-2"],
                },
                disabled: {
                    pointerEvents: "disabled:pointer-events-none",
                },
                "data-[state=open]": {
                    backgroundColor: "data-[state=open]:bg-accent",
                    color: "data-[state=open]:text-muted-foreground",
                },
            }).class()}>
        <X className={tw.style({
                    height: "h-4",
                    width: "w-4",
                }).class()} />
        <span className={tw.style({
                    display: "sr-only",
                }).class()}>Close</span>
      </DialogPrimitive.Close>
    </DialogPrimitive.Content>
  </DialogPortal>
))
DialogContent.displayName = DialogPrimitive.Content.displayName

const DialogHeader = ({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>) => (
  <div
    className={tw.def([className], {
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "flex-col",
            margin: "space-y-1.5",
            textAlign: "text-center",
            sm: {
                textAlign: "sm:text-left",
            },
        })}
    {...props}
  />
)
DialogHeader.displayName = "DialogHeader"

const DialogFooter = ({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>) => (
  <div
    className={tw.def([className], {
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "flex-col-reverse",
            sm: {
                flexDirection: "sm:flex-row",
                justifyContent: "sm:justify-end",
                margin: "sm:space-x-2",
            },
        })}
    {...props}
  />
)
DialogFooter.displayName = "DialogFooter"

const DialogTitle = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof DialogPrimitive.Title>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof DialogPrimitive.Title>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <DialogPrimitive.Title
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        fontSize: "text-lg",
        fontWeight: "font-semibold",
        lineHeight: "leading-none",
        letterSpacing: "tracking-tight",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
DialogTitle.displayName = DialogPrimitive.Title.displayName

const DialogDescription = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof DialogPrimitive.Description>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof DialogPrimitive.Description>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <DialogPrimitive.Description
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        fontSize: "text-sm",
        color: "text-muted-foreground",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
DialogDescription.displayName = DialogPrimitive.Description.displayName

export {
  Dialog,
  DialogPortal,
  DialogOverlay,
  DialogTrigger,
  DialogClose,
  DialogContent,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogDescription,
}
